summary: Completed comprehensive testing of AI Job Hunter feature for Driver Gig CRM. All 21 test features verified successfully. Backend AI endpoints (generate-keywords, search-jobs, draft-outreach, auto-pilot) all working with real Emergent LLM Key. Frontend 3-step wizard fully functional with proper step indicators, chip selections, and AI integrations.
passed_tests: Job Hunter nav item appears in sidebar with 'NEW' badge between Communications and Settings
Clicking Job Hunter navigates to the Job Hunter page (data-testid='job-hunter-page')
Step 1 (Setup): Service Types chip selection toggles properly
Step 1 (Setup): Vehicles chip selection toggles properly
Step 1 (Setup): Target States chip selection toggles, TX is pre-selected
Step 1 (Setup): Search Sources shows Craigslist, Indeed, CBDriver.com, Google Search, LinkedIn, Other (NO uShip - correct)
Step 1 (Setup): 'Show all 51 states' toggle works - shows all states including AK
Step 1 (Setup): 'Generate Keywords' button calls backend AI and shows generated keywords
Step 1 (Setup): 'Search Jobs' button transitions to Step 2 and returns results
Step 2 (Results): Shows job result cards in 2-column grid with source badges, match scores
Step 2 (Results): 'Search These Platforms Directly' section shows clickable links
Step 2 (Results): 'Add to CRM' button adds company to the Companies list (in-memory)
Step 2 (Results): 'Draft Outreach' button transitions to Step 3 with AI-drafted email
Step 3 (Outreach): Shows editable subject and body fields (data-testid='outreach-subject', 'outreach-body')
Step 3 (Outreach): 'Log to Communications' button logs the outreach and returns to Step 2
Step 3 (Outreach): 'Back to Results' button returns to Step 2
Step indicator shows correct active/completed states for each step (checkmarks for completed)
Backend API: POST /api/ai/generate-keywords returns keywords (6/6 tests passed)
Backend API: POST /api/ai/search-jobs returns job results
Backend API: POST /api/ai/draft-outreach returns draft email
Backend API: POST /api/ai/auto-pilot returns results with outreach included
Auto-Pilot button works - shows 'AI Draft Ready' sections with 'Review & Send' and 'Quick Log' buttons
test_credentials: N/A - AI endpoints are open (no auth required)
seed_data_creation: Mock data from mockData.js: 8 companies, activities, handlers. AI endpoints use real Emergent LLM Key.
context_for_next_testing_agent: AI Job Hunter feature fully implemented and tested. 3-step wizard: Step 1 (Setup) with service types, vehicles, states, sources chips; Step 2 (Results) with 2-column job grid, match scores, source badges, Add to CRM/Draft Outreach/Apply buttons; Step 3 (Outreach) with editable subject/body, Log to Communications/Add to CRM & Log/Copy to Clipboard/Regenerate Draft buttons. Auto-Pilot feature works - searches and drafts outreach for all results. All AI endpoints use real Emergent LLM Key (not mocked). data-testid attributes: job-hunter-page, service-chip-{name}, vehicle-chip-{name}, state-chip-{state}, source-chip-{name}, search-jobs-btn, generate-keywords-btn, auto-pilot-btn, add-crm-{id}, draft-outreach-{id}, outreach-subject, outreach-body, log-outreach-btn. Note: Add to CRM uses in-memory state (mockData.js) so changes don't persist across page navigations.

mocked_apis.AI endpoints: NOT MOCKED - all AI endpoints use real Emergent LLM Key
mocked_apis.CRUD operations: Frontend uses mock data from mockData.js (in-memory state)
